hypothesis: Replacing NaviDiv’s fixed diversity thresholds with a per-step PID controller that adjusts constraint weights to maintain a target mean pairwise Tanimoto similarity of 0.12 ± 0.02 will yield ≥10% higher median final property score after 1000 REINVENT4 RL steps while matching scaffold and fragment diversity (within 5%) relative to the best fixed-threshold combined-constraint baseline.
